onboarding.title: Add a model to get started
onboarding.desc: Enter an API key for any model to start using 程小帮. You can also open Settings for full configuration.

home.heading: What should we work on in {{name}}?
home.headingNoProject: What should we work on today?
home.subtitle: Your desktop AI coding companion, ready when you are.

starters.pptPrompt: Help me build a presentation about "", plan the structure and key points for each slide, and generate the PPT file.
starters.docPrompt: Help me write a document about "" and save it as a Word file.
starters.explainPrompt: Explain what this code does and point out any issues:
starters.testPrompt: Write unit tests for the following code:
starters.refactorPrompt: Refactor this code to make it cleaner and easier to maintain:
starters.debugPrompt: I ran into this error — help me find the cause and fix it:

skills.title: Skills & Commands
skills.listDesc: Type / in the composer to quickly invoke these built-in tools and skills.
skills.manageDesc: Create your own skill as <name>/SKILL.md (with name and description frontmatter) in the skills folder; it appears here after a restart.
skills.desktopOnly: This feature is only available in the desktop app

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.themeDesc: Choose the app's light/dark appearance. "System" follows macOS automatically.

general.title: General
general.permDesc: The tool-execution permission new chats start with. You can switch it anytime from the composer.
general.approvalDesc: Ask for your confirmation before writing files, running commands, etc.
general.fullDesc: Run every tool automatically without confirmation (higher risk)

providers.title: Providers
providers.configuredDesc: Pick one to edit, or add a new one below.
providers.required: Configure at least one model with an API Key before using the app.
providers.name: Name

notice.providerRequired: Configure at least one model with an API Key first.
notice.openFolderDesktopOnly: Opening a folder requires the desktop app — the browser preview has no system file-picker access.
notice.addContextDesktopOnly: Adding file context requires the desktop app — the browser preview has no system file-read access.
